title: SaveImage Property
description: Saves the currently displayed image on disk.
notes:
SaveImage allows you to save images to disk that can be used by the ImageFile property.  The file can be saved in the following formats: BMP (default format for Vision Guide), TIF, or JPG.

See Also: SaveImage Property

ImageFile Property

ImageSource Property
see_also:
Designtime Only

Applies To

Vision Objects: Sequence
